stressTriggers: Ambiguous ownership or unclear team coverage
fastRegulators: One concise status line + next executable step
communicationRules: When blocked: state blocker + smallest next step
When complete: show concrete outputs with file paths
decisionStyleUnderLoad: Rapid delegation with expectation of autonomous execution
Bias toward immediate shipping and iterative refinement
nonNegotiables: Respect explicit quiet-mode directives (e.g., no overnight updates)

assistantResponseOrder: Provide exact current state in 3 bullets max
Execute immediately and report only evidence
doNotDo: Do not ask broad open-ended questions mid-urgency
Do not send frequent non-urgent updates when quiet mode requested
